text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text: Air Shakur! Look over here!

text_block_list.name: Reporter B
text_block_list.text: Look over here next, please!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Shakur is speaking to the press today. She
doesn't exactly go out of her way to give
interviews ordinarily, so a lot of journalists have
gathered for the opportunity—just as she said
they would.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Given that the particular purpose of today's
gathering is a photo shoot featuring her signature
racewear, most questions revolve around that.

text_block_list.name: Reporter C
text_block_list.text:
If I were to describe my impression of your
racewear in a word, I'd call it "sharp." Would you
say this reflects your personal tastes?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: It depends on your definition of sharp. But as for whether or not it suits my tastes, I'd say it does, yeah.

text_block_list.name: Reporter D
text_block_list.text:
Does your signature racewear represent your
typical fashion sense?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
I believe I just said it matches my personal tastes.
Next question.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Shakur continues to answer calmly, and the
interview proceeds without a hitch, until out of
nowhere...

text_block_list.name: Reporter E
text_block_list.text: I'd like to ask your trainer a question, if I may.

text_block_list.name: Reporter E
text_block_list.text:
Yes. I'd like to hear your thoughts on Air Shakur's
signature racewear.
choice_data_list: It's the coolest thing I've ever seen.

text_block_list.name: Reporter E
text_block_list.text:
Would it be fair to take your use of the
superlative as a direct comparison to the other
runners?
choice_data_list: That's correct. I think Shakur is the coolest.

text_block_list.name: Reporter E
text_block_list.text:
Air Shakur. What do you make of your trainer's
statement?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
This is hardly the first time my trainer has gotten
carried away with clear bias. I honestly could not
care less.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: But even a broken clock is correct twice a day. I am the coolest.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The interview continues smoothly after that,
until...

text_block_list.name: Reporter E
text_block_list.text: Could you give an example of how?
choice_data_list: It's in perfect sync with her individuality.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Shakur has always had a very striking
appearance. But that doesn't mean the racewear
detracts from it in any way.
choice_data_list:
I think it draws out a common charm between
them!

text_block_list.name: Reporter E
text_block_list.text:
I see what you mean! It certainly does enhance Air
Shakur's natural glamour.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Glamour?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The interview continues smoothly after that,
until...

text_block_list.name: Reporter F
text_block_list.text:
What would you say you were most particular
about in the design?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The level of care Air Shakur put into designing
her signature racewear was something to behold.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She started by seeking a trustworthy designer,
then fussing over the materials and ironing out
the cleat design in meticulous detail. She was fully
engaged throughout the entire process.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
A truly beautiful program is one that functions
without drawing attention to itself.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
From the calculated trim of the fabric to the
asymmetrical scarf at her waist... There are
countless things she might mention.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
What was I particular about?
Well...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Isn't that obvious?

text_block_list.name: Reporter F
text_block_list.text: Erm? Miss Shakur?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Shakur slips away from the reporters and steps
up to the starting position on the track.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Yaaah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She explodes forward as if a starting gun has
sounded, the waist scarf billowing behind her as
she speeds around the track.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Whew...

text_block_list.name: Reporters
text_block_list.text:
...Holy cow!
She's captivating! Tell me you're getting this!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: ...Hmph.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
I believe that answers the last question. That'll do
for today.

text_block_list.name: Reporter F
text_block_list.text:
Huh?! Sorry, but you haven't actually answered
yet!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: I showed you my answer.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: I'm going ahead. Wrap this up however you like.

text_block_list.name: Reporter F
text_block_list.text: Um, Trainer. What just happened?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She doesn't tell lies, so she must have already laid
out the intermediate steps required to find the
solution. As long as I realize that much, I should
be able to solve the problem...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
A truly beautiful program is one that functions
without drawing attention to itself.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Shakur has demonstrated her program in
action, directing everyone's eyes to herself as she
ran, and nothing else.
choice_data_list: I'm just guessing, but her answer might be...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Hey.
The hell's up with this article?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: "Each and every fiber in the body has a numerical value, and the intricate equation woven out of them produces one simple result: running."

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
"Whether it's highlighting her eccentricity in the
paddock or her razor-sharp grace on the
track—her signature racewear is just the suit for
the job."

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: What's with this exaggerated hype job? I didn't say any of this crap.
choice_data_list: But your run was the proof.
But your run was the proof.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
You're so dumb.
Quit actin' like you get anything.
